FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOPPL, RUDOLPH HEARING SET FOR JUN-18-2003 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, *A R G U E D AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING --PLAINTIFF RUDOLPH KOPPL'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IS INVALID BECAUSE PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK LEGAL REMEDY BY CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT TO PAY HIGHEST RENT, OR UNLAWFUL DETAINER FOR FAILURE TO PAY HIGHEST RENT, BOTH OF WHICH WOULD ALLOW JURY TRIAL UNLIKE DECLARATORY RELIEF. SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF HAS NO STANDING TO SEEK DISGORGEMENT TO HIMSELF FOR MONIES PAID BY SUBTENANT. REPORTER: LEE BATARA, CSR #3759 (CB/301/JU)
MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-21-2003 VACATED, DISMISSAL FILED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2003 Vacated

For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-18-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Eric McFarland, Esq., and Ronald Schivo, Esq., Law Offices of Andrew Zaks, plaintiff/moving party Rudolph Koppl.
Laurence A. Denny, Esq., Morrison & Foerster, 415-268-6015, for defendant/opposing party Greg Herman.
*A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling --PLAINTIFF RUDOLPH KOPPL'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is Denied. First cause of action for declaratory relief is invalid because plaintiff may seek legal remedy by cause of action for breach of contract to pay highest rent, or unlawful detainer for failure to pay highest rent, both of which would allow jury trial unlike declaratory relief. Second cause of action, plaintiff has no standing to seek disgorgement to himself for monies paid by subtenant. Reporter: Lee Batara, CSR #3759 (CB/301/JU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2003 Set For Trial On Jul-21-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jan-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
